reviews.comment:
Tarda una eternidad sus bombas y los playeros cuidan la manguera! Si piden lleno deja que se llenne!!

(Translated by Google)
Their pumps take forever, and the attendants are very protective of the hose! If they ask for a full tank, let them fill it up!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKamJtZGRBEAE

reviews.comment:
Una estación mínima de difícil acceso. Nos costó un peru dar con ella... el gps nos mandaba al hotel del ACA

(Translated by Google)
A tiny, hard-to-reach station. It took us ages to find it... the GPS kept sending us to the ACA hotel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKNVp1Ni1BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Una estación común con todas las formas de pago

(Translated by Google)
A common station with all forms of payment
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKMmJqeVJREAE

reviews.comment:
La estación después de las 22 está cerrada, si viajas de noche es para tener en cuenta.

(Translated by Google)
The station is closed after 10 pm, so keep that in mind if you're traveling at night.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKbWRHakJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Feo. Pocas ganas del personal.

(Translated by Google)
Ugly. Lack of enthusiasm from the staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKdHFMV0xREAE

reviews.comment:
Nos salvó xq teníamos un neumático desinflado y lo inflamos y pudimos volver a salta

(Translated by Google)
It saved us because we had a flat tire and we inflated it and were able to return to Salta.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKN0tUcTZnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Me atendieron bien , pero no tenían combustible

(Translated by Google)
They treated me well, but they didn't have fuel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKLWJISTZRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención y amabilidad del personal.

(Translated by Google)
Good service and friendliness of the staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKLWFhek5nEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención. Lástima que no entregan dinero en efectivo como otras estaciones de servicio.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. It's a shame they don't give cash like other gas stations.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKeWR1MDNnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Tienen bebidas pero no café. Buena atención como toda la gente que recibe a los turistas muy bien.

(Translated by Google)
They have drinks but no coffee. The service is excellent, as is the staff who welcome tourists.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNKOGVXSWtnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Es la única estación de servicio de Cachi y la zona

(Translated by Google)
Good service. It's the only gas station in Cachi and the surrounding area.
